strategy: Team fight at ~58,000 health: one hitter, supports who blade and Feint, and someone carrying shield removal.
Hit with Ice or Life. He resists those only 28%, versus 48% Storm/Myth/Balance and 68% Fire/Death.
He stacks a Tower Shield every Round in a 3-Round cycle: -25% on Round 1, -50% on Round 2, -90% on Round 3, then resets. They pile up, so a clean hit needs them gone.
Strip his Tower Shields with Shatter or Steal Ward (or overload with pierce) the same round the hitter fires.
Time the kill early in a cycle before the -90% lands, and stack blades and Feint so one shot ends it.
cheatNotes: Round 1 of each 3-Round cycle he adds a -25% Tower Shield, which blocks every school.
Round 2 he adds a -50% Tower Shield on top. Strip the shields before hitting.
Round 3 he adds a -90% Tower Shield, the big wall. Kill before it lands or Shatter through it.
